steps.title: Spot the parallel structure
steps.content: All three examples—leaving dead prey, bringing live prey, feeding directly—describe different methods of performing the same action with food for young animals.

steps.title: Match the verb
steps.content: Provide means to supply or make available—the core action illustrated by all three methods. Avoid, guess, and describe don't capture the idea of making food accessible to offspring. That matches choice C — C is correct.
